Frequently Asked Questions
1. NTA AIAPGET Admissions Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 10 July 2026.
2. NTA AIAPGET Admissions Exam Date?
The Examination will be conducted in 22/08/2026 .
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the NTA AIAPGET Admissions Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the NTA AIAPGET Admissions Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. NTA AIAPGET 2026 Admissions Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. NTA AIAPGET 2026 Online Form Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 30 July 2026..
6. What is the last date to Pay application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 30 July 2026 .
7. How can I apply for NTA AIAPGET Admissions Exam?
NTA AIAPGET Admissions Online Form 2026 .
tables: NTA All India Ayush Post Graduate Entrance Test AIAPGET Admissions 2026 Apply Online Form

National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the All India Ayush Post Graduate Entrance Test AIAPGET online application for AIAPGET admission 2026 will start from Date 10 July 2026 and the last date to apply will be 30 July 2026 . Various Institution are participating in All India Ayush Post Graduate Entrance Test AIAPGET 2026, candidates should read the information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, placement, fees, college information and other types of information and then apply
